data.title: Beta Bionics misses key targets, but reports $32M Q4 revenue, up 56% YoY, with 35,000+ users, double from previous year.
data.description: Beta Bionics Inc. (NASDAQ: BBNX) announced strong preliminary fourth-quarter 2025 results, with net sales projected to surpass $32 million, indicating a 56% year-over-year surge from the estimated $28.19 million. Durable Medical Equipment (DME) channel sales are expected to hit a minimum of $22.3 million, a rise of at least 23%. Revenue from the Pharmacy Benefit Plan (PBP) channel is anticipated to reach at least $9.7 million, from $2.4 million in the prior year. The company forecasts its user base to exceed 35,000, more than doubling the 15,298 users recorded a year ago. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Helen of Troy's Q3 earnings in line with expectations, sales surpass, but they lower outlook; EPS cut to $3.25-$3.75.
data.description: Helen of Troy Limited (NASDAQ: HELE) reported its third-quarter earnings with adjusted earnings per share at $1.71, in line with analyst expectations. Although the quarterly sales of $512.829 million exceeded projections of $503.587 million, representing a 3.4% decrease year over year. The company adjusted its fiscal 2026 earnings per share forecast to a range of $3.25 to $3.75, down from the previous outlook of $3.75 to $4.25. This new range falls below the analyst estimate of $4.02. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Citigroup expected to report Q4 earnings of $1.62/share, up from $1.35/share a year ago. Revenue estimate - $20.45 billion.
data.description: Citigroup Inc. is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Wednesday, Jan. 14, 2025. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.62 per share, a notable increase from $1.35 per share in the same quarter last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $20.45 billion, up from $19.58 billion a year ago. The recent decision to sell AO Citibank represents Citigroup's final move to exit its operations in Russia. Following this news, Citigroup's stock closed at $120.60 on Thursday, reflecting a 0.6% decrease. For additional insights and analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on the Benzinga platform.

data.title: BitGo helps iPower with digital asset treasury transactions, including BTC and ETH purchases through BitGo Bank & Trust.
data.description: BitGo Holdings Inc. assisted iPower Inc. (Nasdaq: IPW) in executing and safeguarding its digital asset treasury deals. iPower bought Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) via BitGo Bank & Trust. The transactions, facilitated by BitGo Prime's OTC trading services, were successfully completed.

data.title: US consumer sentiment index in January rose to 54 points from 52.9 in December, highest since September 2025. Tariff worries easing, cautious optimism about economy.
data.description: At the beginning of 2026, U.S. consumers experienced a slight uptick in sentiment, with the preliminary January consumer sentiment index reaching 54 points, up from December's 52.9. This is the highest level recorded since September 2025, surpassing the expected 53.5. The rise can partially be attributed to the December employment report, which indicated slower hiring rates and a decrease in job losses. The increase in sentiment for the second consecutive month was particularly notable among lower-income households. Joanne Hsu, the Director of Surveys of Consumers, highlighted improvement in sentiment among lower-income consumers, while sentiment among higher-income households declined. Consumers remain focused on concerns such as high prices and a weakening labor market, with worries about tariffs gradually diminishing. However, there is still a sense of caution regarding the overall strength of businesses among consumers.

data.title: WIRobotics draws global attention at CES 2026 with diverse robotics showcased, co-led by Younbaek Lee and Yongjae Kim.
data.description: WIRobotics, a leading global robotics firm headed by Co-CEOs Younbaek Lee and Yongjae Kim, has revealed it is attracting significant interest from international media and industry partners at the CES 2026 primary showcase in Las Vegas. The event, which commenced on January 9, 2026, is witnessing a surge in attention towards the company's innovative offerings.

data.title: Marriott Bonvoy partners with ICC, providing exclusive access to global cricket events. Official Accommodation Partner in multi-year deal.
data.description: Marriott Bonvoy has been chosen as the Official Accommodation Partner in a long-term strategic collaboration. The agreement between Marriott Bonvoy and the International Cricket Council (ICC) was made official in Bethesda, Md., on January 9, 2026. This partnership will involve Marriott International's top-notch services being provided to support ICC events and tournaments globally.

data.title: Zebra Technologies introduces AI-powered solutions for retail ops at NRF 2026. Booth #3303 at Jacob K. Javits Center, Jan 11-13 in NYC.
data.description: Zebra Technologies Corporation, a prominent player in streamlining workflows through digitization, is set to present its newest AI-powered products and services at NRF 2026: Retail’s Big Show. The company will exhibit its solutions at Booth #3303 during the event scheduled from Jan. 11-13, 2026, at the Jacob K. Javits Convention Center in New York City. With retail businesses striving to keep up in a demanding environment, Zebra's offerings aim to assist in meeting the escalating consumer demands.

data.description: Raleigh, North Carolina - Advance Auto Parts has announced OSRAM Sylvania Inc. as the Global 2025 Vendor Partner of the Year.

data.title: REAL Shows Network (RSN) introduces The Houston Collective, a new TV series in Houston, TX, highlighting real estate and lifestyle.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, the REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the addition of The Houston Collective, a new program based in Houston, TX, to its lineup. The series will be hosted by Beth and other local real estate leaders in the area. The RSN is a national TV platform that focuses on showcasing real estate and lifestyle narratives. This new show signifies the network's commitment to highlighting the real estate market in Houston, a key city in the industry.

data.title: Pinnacle Financial and Morris State Bancshares rebrand as Vallant Financial; partnership reflects commitment to community since 1934.
data.description: In Elberton, Georgia and Dublin, Georgia, a strategic partnership was announced on Jan. 7, 2026, by Pinnacle Financial Corporation, the parent company of Pinnacle Bank, and Morris State Bancshares, Inc., the parent company of Morris Bank (OTCQX: MBLU). This partnership was established in November under a new brand name. The unified holding company, Vallant Financial, Inc., embodies the forward-thinking approach and strong community commitment that both companies have upheld since 1934.

data.title: Bright Minds Biosciences closed US$175M public offering of 1,945,000 common shares at US$90.00 per share. Underwriters have option for additional shares.
data.description: On January 9th, 2026, Bright Minds Biosciences Inc. (CSE: DRUG) (NASDAQ: DRUG) successfully closed a public offering they recently announced. The offering involved 1,945,000 common shares at a price of US$90.00 per share, resulting in gross proceeds of US$175,050,000. Additionally, the underwriters have been granted a 30-day option to buy up to 291,750 additional common shares at the same price, minus discounts and commissions. All the securities in this offering were provided by Bright Minds.
